summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CotizaBot Stripe Payment Integration. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including Precios page (authenticated/unauthenticated states), Stripe checkout redirect, and PagoExitoso verification page.
critical_code_review_comments: Stripe integration is properly implemented using emergentintegrations.payments.stripe.checkout
Payment amounts are hardcoded in backend (PLANES dict) - frontend cannot manipulate prices (secure)
Checkout session creates transaction record before redirect (good for tracking)
Webhook handler properly prevents duplicate processing with existing check
All payment endpoints require authentication except /api/pagos/planes (correct)
seed_data_creation: Multiple checkout sessions created during testing (cs_test_* prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment system fully tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_pagos.py cover: GET /api/pagos/planes (public), POST /api/pagos/crear-checkout (auth required, returns valid Stripe URL), GET /api/pagos/checkout-status/{session_id} (auth required, returns pending/paid status), GET /api/pagos/mi-suscripcion (auth required, returns subscription info). Frontend tests verified: Precios page shows correct pricing ($0 gratis, $1,000 + IVA = $1,160 completo), unauthenticated users see 'Empezar Ahora' and 'Comenzar Gratis' buttons, authenticated users see 'Actualizar Ahora - $1,160 MXN' and 'Ir al Dashboard' buttons, clicking 'Actualizar Ahora' redirects to checkout.stripe.com with correct amount, PagoExitoso page shows verification spinner and polls checkout status.

backend: GET /api/pagos/planes - Returns Plan Completo with correct pricing (1000 base + 160 IVA = 1160 MXN)
POST /api/pagos/crear-checkout - Requires auth, returns valid Stripe checkout URL (checkout.stripe.com)
GET /api/pagos/checkout-status/{session_id} - Requires auth, returns pending/paid status
GET /api/pagos/mi-suscripcion - Requires auth, returns plan info (demo/gratis/completo)
frontend: Precios page (unauthenticated) - Shows Plan Gratis ($0) and Plan Completo ($1,000 + IVA)
Precios page (unauthenticated) - Shows 'Comenzar Gratis' and 'Empezar Ahora' buttons
Precios page (unauthenticated) - Shows 'Iniciar Sesión' and 'Probar Gratis' in nav
Precios page (authenticated) - Shows 'Actualizar Ahora - $1,160 MXN' button
Precios page (authenticated) - Shows 'Ir al Dashboard' button in nav
Stripe Checkout - Clicking 'Actualizar Ahora' redirects to checkout.stripe.com
Stripe Checkout - Shows correct amount MX$1,160.00 in Sandbox mode
PagoExitoso page - Shows 'Verificando Pago' with loading spinner
